Title: Relates to labor peace agreements and the cannabis industry wage board; repealer
Summary: Relates to labor peace agreements and the cannabis industry wage board.
LawCode: Rpld §3 sub 29, §66 sub 5, amd §§10, 35, 64 & 66, Cannabis L; ren §665 to be §669, add §665, Lab L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the cannabis law and the labor law, in relation to labor peace agreements and the cannabis wage industry board; and repealing certain provisions of the cannabis law relating thereto
